title: Passive structures
explanation:
Passive structures

At B1+ level, you should control passive forms in different tenses and with reporting verbs: It is believed that..., He was asked to...

questions.text: The building [*is being renovated|renovates|has renovating] at the moment.
He [*was asked to present|asked to present|was asking present] the results.
It [*is believed|believes|is believing] that the painting is genuine.
By the time we arrived, the guests [*had been served|had served|were serving].
The winners [*will be announced|announce|will announce] tomorrow morning.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The documents ____ before the meeting started. | *had been prepared | had prepared | were preparing
English ____ in many international workplaces. | *is used | uses | is using
She ____ to explain the delay. | *was expected | expected | was expecting
The proposal ____ by the board next week. | *will be reviewed | reviews | will review
The road [*has been closed|has closed|is closed now by] since the storm.
The film [*is said to be|says to be|is saying to be] based on a true story.
Several trees [*were blown down|blew down|were blowing down] during the night.
New safety rules [*are likely to be introduced|likely introduce|are introducing likely] soon.
